move_ribbed_cylinder_to_orange_cart.query: a worker lifts a hollow metal cylinder with vertical ribs from the large center container using the right hand and places it into the orange cart-like container on the right

move_ribbed_cylinder_to_metal_table.query: a worker lifts a hollow metal cylinder with vertical ribs from the large center container using the right hand and places it on the adjacent silver metal table

lift_ribbed_cylinder_from_bulk_container.query: a worker lifts a hollow metal cylinder with vertical ribs from the large center container using the right hand
